qna.Why are you interested in this role?: I am passionate about automating infrastructure and application deployment pipelines, and this role aligns perfectly with my DevOps and cloud experience.
I have 5 years of experience configuring CI/CD pipelines, containerizing applications with Docker, managing Kubernetes clusters, and automating cloud infrastructure.
Extensive experience with AWS services including EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch, and VPC architectures.
Hands-on experience building and optimizing automated pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI.
Proficient in configuring EKS/K8s clusters, writing deployment manifests, service meshes, helm charts, and managing cluster security.
Experienced setting up Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack for log monitoring and real-time infrastructure alerting.
